Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting possible impaired renal function. Mildly elevated ALT may indicate liver involvement. LDL cholesterol is high and HDL is low, increasing cardiovascular risk. Chloride is slightly elevated, and globulin is low, which may warrant further evaluation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further assessment of renal, hepatic, and cardiovascular status.
